description: RRF k-parameter grid search (10-100) + channel weight grid (dense/bm25/graph)
reason: No impact: cross-encoder reranker dominates final ranking; with 33 corpus nodes and 5x fetch factor, retrieval stage always surfaces all candidates regardless of RRF params
Helps cue_trigger (+0.22) and multi_hop (+0.07) but devastates KU (-0.16) and ku_filter (-0.22). Net R@1 regression.
Zero impact on any category. Gap detection finds no gaps with current corpus.

description: LLM reranker (4B) on v2 hard benchmark
reason: 4B model lacks reasoning depth for chain_reasoning and cue_trigger cases

description: LLM decompose on v2 hard benchmark
reason: 4B model decomposes queries incorrectly, breaking retrieval

description: LLM rewrite on v2 hard benchmark

reason: 568M CE can't distinguish relevance even with rewritten queries
Longer prompt confuses 4B model, performance decreases
Larger CE still gives near-identical scores for relevant vs irrelevant docs
